title: Basic Valid Subsequence ✅
description: All characters of s appear in t in correct order ✔️

title: Character Missing ❌
description: Character 'x' is not present in t 🚫

title: Empty s String 🟢
description: Empty string is always a subsequence ✨

title: Empty t String 🔴
description: Non-empty s cannot be formed from empty t ⚠️

title: Both Strings Empty ⚪
description: Empty string is subsequence of empty string ✔️

title: Order Mismatch 🔄❌
description: Characters exist but order is incorrect 🚫

title: Insufficient Repetition ❗
description: Not enough 'a' characters in correct sequence ⚠️
